headline: FICO Mortgage Score Simulator Highlights Evolving Consumer Role In Fair Isaac Story
summary: Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) has launched a new FICO Mortgage Score Simulator designed to help consumers prepare for mortgage applications. The tool allows users to see how different credit decisions could influence the mortgage specific FICO scores that many lenders use. This launch expands Fair Isaac's direct to consumer offerings at a time when home affordability is a key concern for many borrowers. For investors watching NYSE:FICO, this move illustrates how the company is leaning further into...

headline: Wix Stock Has Tanked 70% This Past Year, and One Investor Sold $6 Million in Shares Last Quarter
summary: Wix.com offers cloud-based website creation and business tools worldwide, generating recurring revenue through its subscription model.

headline: FICO Partners with Banzai to Bring Credit Education to Millions of Students Nationwide
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., March 02, 2026--FICO partners with Banzai to deliver credit education to millions of students across 70% of US schools through interactive curriculum launching 2026.
